name: 1St Bank Yuma
description_short: 1st Bank Yuma is now OneAZ Credit Union, a community-focused financial institution serving Arizona with branch locations in Yuma, San Luis, and Nogales offering personal and business banking services.
description_long:
1st Bank Yuma operated as an independent community bank serving the Yuma, Arizona area before merging with OneAZ Credit Union. The institution maintained deep roots in the local community with multiple branch locations and a focus on personalized service. Following its acquisition by OneAZ Credit Union, the entity now operates under the OneAZ brand while maintaining the same local staff and community commitment that characterized the original bank.

The combined entity offers a comprehensive range of financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, business loans, commercial lending, personal loans, and digital banking services. Members gain access to expanded resources including 25+ OneAZ locations statewide and 41,000+ ATM locations nationwide. The organization emphasizes free financial coaching, competitive member-only rates, and flexible banking options combining both digital 24/7 access and in-person branch guidance across multiple locations.

What distinguishes this institution is its explicit commitment to keeping member dollars local while strengthening Arizona communities, combined with a community-driven debit card program that funds local nonprofits. The transition to OneAZ expanded service offerings while preserving the local team relationships and personal attention that built the original bank's reputation. Customer testimonials highlight the professional expertise of staff in commercial lending and the personalized service approach that differentiates it from larger regional banks.

A significant caveat is that 1st Bank Yuma no longer exists as a standalone entity—it is now OneAZ Credit Union. Members transitioning from the original bank should expect brand changes and integration with OneAZ systems, though the website indicates operational continuity and expanded benefits. The institution's service area remains concentrated in Arizona despite the expanded ATM network, and local decision-making authority may have been consolidated at the parent credit union level.
services: Business checking and business banking services
Personal loans for various purposes (home purchase, business launch, savings goals)
In-person branch banking across multiple Arizona locations
Debit card services with access to 41,000+ ATM network
Free financial coaching and education resources
NCUA-insured deposits up to $250,000 per individual
pros: Access to 41,000+ ATM locations nationwide through OneAZ Debit Card, expanding from limited local ATM network
NCUA insurance protection up to $250,000 per individual member account
Free financial coaching and resources available to all members for financial wellness support
Multiple convenient branch locations in Yuma, San Luis, Nogales, and 22+ additional OneAZ locations statewide
Community-driven debit card program where member purchases fund local nonprofits
Competitive member-exclusive rates on loans and financial products
24/7 digital banking combined with in-person branch service for flexible account management
cons: Brand identity changed from 1st Bank Yuma to OneAZ Credit Union, requiring member adjustment to new name and systems
Service area remains primarily Arizona-focused despite expanded ATM network, limiting convenience for customers relocating outside the state
Original bank's independent local decision-making authority consolidated into parent credit union structure, potentially reducing local control
Website prominently displays transition messaging rather than clear current service details, creating potential confusion about offerings
Limited information available about specific product terms, rates, or fee structures on the public website
best_for: Arizona residents and business owners seeking community-focused banking with local decision-making and relationship-based lending
Small business owners needing personalized commercial lending and business banking services from staff with local market knowledge
Individuals prioritizing community investment who want their banking activity to support local nonprofits and Arizona businesses
Customers valuing personal service relationships over digital-only banking or large national bank impersonal approaches
diagnosis: This profile is best suited for Arizona-based consumers and small business owners seeking personalized community banking with local staff relationships and a commitment to funding local nonprofits. The primary caveat is that 1st Bank Yuma no longer operates as an independent entity—it is now OneAZ Credit Union—so prospective customers should expect integration into OneAZ systems while the local team and service commitment remain consistent with the original institution's values.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: OneAZ Credit Union (formerly 1st Bank Yuma) serves Arizona with branches in Yuma, San Luis, and Nogales offering personal and business banking.
